name: legacy.css
description: A classless CSS framework inspired by classic corporate administrative systems.
author: moises

scripts.build:all: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:min
scripts.build:docs: pnpm run build:all && mkdir -p docs/assets && cp dist/legacy.css docs/assets/legacy.css && cp dist/legacy.min.css docs/assets/legacy.min.css
